data.title: Cookie DAO announces closure of Snaps operations.
data.description: Cookie DAO announced on the X platform that InfoFi is undergoing significant changes and is officially ceasing operations of Snaps. Previously, X had revoked API access for the InfoFi app.

data.title: Hassett: If I were to head the Federal Reserve, I would be able to persuade my colleagues.
data.description: Hassett, a leading candidate for the next Federal Reserve chair, denied concerns that he would struggle to persuade other Fed officials to support his views if appointed. Hassett stated on Thursday, "I'm tough enough to win debates. Anyone who comes to the White House and faces every possible question for five years—like me—is tough enough to handle hostile situations and help people understand why they are right or wrong." Hassett has consistently argued that Fed Chair Powell and his colleagues have been too slow in cutting interest rates, a view shared by Trump. Fed watchers point out that interest rate decisions depend on a majority vote on the Federal Open Market Committee, and a Trump-nominated chair may not be able to forge a consensus on significant rate cuts. Hassett reiterated that Trump believes the Fed, under Powell's leadership, has been politically biased, cutting rates before the 2024 election but halting the easing cycle after Trump's inauguration in 2025. "He believes that sometimes their decisions appear partisan," Hassett said. (Jinshi)

data.title: Coinbase launches Lighter (LIT) perpetual contract trading
data.description: Coinbase will launch trading of Lighter (LIT) perpetual contracts. If liquidity conditions are met and trading is supported in the region, the LIT-PERP market will open on or after 18:30 UTC on January 15.

data.title: Cookie DAO Announces Termination of Snaps Operations Amid InfoFi Changes
data.description: According to Odaily, Cookie DAO announced on the X platform that InfoFi is undergoing significant changes and has officially decided to cease operations of Snaps. Previously, it was reported that X revoked InfoFi application's API access.

data.title: BlackRock withdrew $900 million worth of BTC from Coinbase in the past two days.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, BlackRock (0x4a2...b82) withdrew 6,647 BTC (approximately $638 million) and 4,179 ETH (approximately $13.76 million) from Coinbase in the past 8 hours. In the past two days, BlackRock has cumulatively withdrawn 9,346 BTC from exchanges, with a total value of approximately $900 million.

data.title: Polygon Implements Significant Workforce Reduction Amid Strategic Shift
data.description: According to PANews, Polygon has recently undertaken substantial internal layoffs, with approximately 30% of its workforce being dismissed this week. Several employees and ecosystem members associated with Polygon have shared news of their departures or team changes on social media. These layoffs follow Polygon's strategic pivot towards the stablecoin payment sector and its acquisition of Coinme and Sequence for a total of $250 million. Kurt Patat, Communications Director at Polygon Labs, confirmed that the layoffs are part of post-acquisition team integration efforts, and the overall company headcount is expected to remain stable.

data.description:

data.title: Solana listed on Starknet token STRK
data.description: Solana's official account posted on the X platform that it has listed Starknet's token STRK on the Solana network via Near. Previously, Solana's official account posted a message on the X platform mocking Starknet, seemingly to generate buzz for the upcoming collaboration. Related reading: 8 Daily Active Users? The Truth Behind the Data in the Solana vs. Starknet War of Words

data.title: Michael Saylor Discusses Digital Credit as a Refinement of Digital Capital
data.description: According to BlockBeats, on January 16, Michael Saylor stated that digital credit represents a refinement of digital capital. He explained that it involves stripping away risk, suppressing volatility, compressing terms, converting currencies, and extracting yields.

data.title: State Street Launches Digital Asset Platform for Tokenized Funds
data.description:
State Street Corporation has formally launched its Digital Asset Platform, introducing new institutional infrastructure for issuing and servicing tokenized funds and digital cash products. The rollout marks a shift beyond the firm’s traditional back-office role, placing State Street directly into on-chain asset issuance and lifecycle management.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/state-street-launches-digital-asset-platform-for-tokenized-funds/

data.title: Over 60% of Traders Lost Money on Eric Adams-Backed NYC Token
data.description:
Eric Adams, who stepped down as New York City’s mayor two weeks ago, made a high-profile entry into the crypto space with the launch of his own token, NYC. Less than 24 hours later, more than half of the 4,300 traders who bought the token were left with losses. The project quickly took on the characteristics of a meme coin, with analysts describing the episode as a textbook rug pull scenario. The Unexpected Comeback of Political Meme Coins Most people thought that 2025 had marked the end of the meme coin wave
source: https://beincrypto.com/eric-adams-backed-nyc-token-crash/
